reason: Verify global RVV-first and stack constraints remain intact.
Verify direct contraction owner, route-control, runtime ABI, artifact mirror, and fail-closed rules are respected.
Verify common EmitC remains neutral and consumes provider-built route output only.
Verify route authority remains plugin-local and not metadata-derived.
Verify executable claims are backed by ssh rvv evidence and focused checks.
Verify predecessor owner-path behavior is not regressed.
